title: Pricing Analyst
description: Nike is seeking a Pricing Analyst to optimize pricing strategies across our global product portfolio. Analyze market dynamics, competitor pricing, and demand elasticity to recommend pricing that maximizes revenue and market share. Work onsite in Cincinnati, home to Nike World Headquarters, contributing to iconic athletic brands.
responsibilities: Analyze sales data, market trends, and competitor pricing to inform pricing recommendations
Develop pricing models using statistical analysis and Excel tools
Monitor price performance and elasticity across product categories
Support promotional planning and margin optimization initiatives
Prepare reports and presentations for merchandising and finance teams

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, or related field
skills: Advanced Excel with data analysis functions

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
